text:
Created attachment 144647
svn diff on head

Can someone commit this for me? svn diff on head attached.

If can make it before Wednesday, would be in time for this week's pkg build ;)


Summary:

* Change in run deps (tsmuxer) have already been discussed at length off-list.
* Other few minor changes.

4.0.0-b1 found to run correctly inside FreeBSD jail. Same / no different than previous recent 'a1' build from few days ago. They mostly just change some web interface / .css in this 'b1' release. It isn't a significant matter.

Build successful on Redports. (with removed 'linux-tsmuxer' dependancy).

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140714102720-17987/


 Many thanks.
